inputs.label: Fraction 1 Numerator
inputs.businessContext: Actual numerator (e.g., parts of component A in a batch).

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual numerator (e.g., parts of component A in a batch).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçek pay (örneğin, bir partideki A bileşeninin parçaları).
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächlicher Zähler (z. B. Teile von Komponente A in einer Charge).

inputs.label: Fraction 1 Denominator
inputs.businessContext: Actual denominator (e.g., total parts in the batch).

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual denominator (e.g., total parts in the batch).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçek payda (örneğin, partideki toplam parça sayısı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächlicher Nenner (z. B. Gesamtteile in der Charge).

inputs.label: Fraction 2 Numerator
inputs.businessContext: Specified numerator (e.g., target parts of component A).

businessContext_i18n.en: Specified numerator (e.g., target parts of component A).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirtilen pay (örneğin, A bileşeninin hedef parçaları).
businessContext_i18n.de: Vorgegebener Zähler (z. B. Zielteile von Komponente A).

businessContext_i18n.tr: Belirtilen payda (örneğin, hedef toplam parça sayısı).

inputs.label: Tolerance
inputs.businessContext: Acceptable floating point deviation for equivalence check.

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceptable floating point deviation for equivalence check.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Eşitlik kontrolü için kabul edilebilir kayan nokta sapması.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
